name: 22.50 MG Leuprolide Acetate For Injection
about: 22.50 MG Leuprolide Acetate For Injection is a drug used to treat various medical conditions such as prostate cancer, endometriosis, and uterine fibroids. It is an injection-based drug with a dosage of 22.50 MG and is recommended to be administered as per the doctors suggestion. The drug is a liquid that is stored in a cool place to maintain its efficacy. This drug is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, and trade purposes.
